zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Tosny III於1104年出生在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德時，他的父親Raoul Ralph de Tosny III24歲，母親Adelise of Huntingdon26歲。他於大約1129年與Gertrude de Hainault在法國諾門迪艾康查--結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1157年9月29日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Tosny III于1104年出生在英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德时，他的父亲Raoul Ralph de Tosny III24岁，母亲Adelise of Huntingdon26岁。他于大约1129年与Gertrude de Hainault在法国諾門迪艾康查--结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1157年9月29日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Tosny III was born in 1104, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, was 24 and his mother, Adelise of Huntingdon, was 26. He married Gertrude de Hainault about 1129, in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 September 1157, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Tosny III est né en 1104, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adelise of Huntingdon, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude de Hainault environ 1129, à Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1157, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Tosny III 1104 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul Ralph de Tosny III 24 und seine Mutter Adelise of Huntingdon 26. Er hat um 1129 in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich Gertrude de Hainault geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. September 1157 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Tosny III è nato il nel 1104 nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Adelise of Huntingdon, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude de Hainault circa 1129, nel Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 settembre 1157, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Tosny IIIが1104年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで生まれた時，父Raoul Ralph de Tosny IIIは24歳，母Adelise of Huntingdonは26歳であった。約1129年にフランスノーマンディエウアコンチェス-エン-オウチェでGertrude de Hainaultと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1157年9月29日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Tosny III(이)가 1104년 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul Ralph de Tosny III(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise of Huntingdon(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1129년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콘체스--우체에서 Gertrude de Hainault(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1157년 9월 29일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Egginton, Derbyshire, England: Egginton, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Tosny III nasceu em 1104, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adelise of Huntingdon, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrude de Hainault aproximadamente 1129, em Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1157, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Tosny III родился в 1104 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Raoul Ralph de Tosny III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adelise of Huntingdon, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude de Hainault около 1129 г. в местности кончес-ен-оуч, эур, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 сентября 1157 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Tosny III nació en 1104, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Raoul Ralph de Tosny III, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adelise of Huntingdon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gertrude de Hainault aproximadamente 1129, en Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1157, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
